title: Method: pane.rename
text:
Method name: `pane.rename`

Parameters (REQUIRED):

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `selector` | string | REQUIRED | A pane selector string per [[RFC-0001:C-SELECTORS]]. |
| `name` | string | REQUIRED | The new title for the pane. |

The plugin MUST resolve the selector to exactly one pane. If zero panes match, the plugin MUST return `no_match`. If multiple panes match, the plugin MUST return `ambiguous_match`.

The plugin MUST call `rename_pane_with_id` with the provided name.

On success, the response MUST contain `{"renamed": "<pane_id>"}`.
